meaning: n.[动](非洲产)疣猴,髯猴(亦作 colobus monkey)
examples: This is the only home of the red Colobus monkey but there are very few left.
A black colobus monkey is roasted for sale at an illegal bush-meat market in Gabon.
The red Colobus Monkeys: Variation In Demography, Behavior, And Ecology Of Endangered Species.
Many areas where chimpanzees live are also home to the red colobus monkey, which the chimps hunt.
